reasoning: As of mid-October 2025, credible reports (Chartmasters data via various outlets) position The Weeknd in 4th place globally for most streams on Spotify in 2025. Taylor Swift remains the dominant force, holding the #1 spot as she did in 2023 and 2024, with a significant lead in total streams (reportedly over 100 billion all-time and much higher YTD volume). The Weeknd's major project for the year, 'Hurry Up Tomorrow', was released early in late January/February 2025, meaning its peak streaming impact has already occurred. Given that Spotify Wrapped tracking typically concludes in late October or early November, it is statistically improbable for The Weeknd to bridge the gap to #1 from 4th place in the remaining timeframe. Furthermore, other artists like Bruno Mars and Drake have also shown strong streaming performance in 2025, further crowding the top positions.
